_comment: Default shipped job descriptor for the periodic ai-infra-audit. The adapter copies this into marker.scheduler.jobs[] at install time. Users can edit the schedule, disable the job, or remove it from the marker without affecting the orchestra's install state.
description: Run the ai-infra-audit skill weekly to catch rule drift, stale learnings, and version mismatches before they accumulate.

schedule._note: In v1 the kind is 'manual' — the runner records the descriptor but does not auto-fire. In v2, change kind to 'cron' and set expr + tz to activate automatic weekly runs.

v2_upgrade._tz_note: 'auto' resolves to the timezone recorded in the install marker. Falls back to UTC if unrecorded.
